name: Memphis City Employees
description_short: Marathon County Employees Credit Union (MCECU) is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union serving employees and their families in Wausau, Wisconsin with competitive loan rates, savings accounts, and financial counseling.
description_long:
Marathon County Employees Credit Union (MCECU) is a federally-insured credit union headquartered in Wausau, Wisconsin, operating as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution. The credit union has established itself as a community-focused lender with physical branches, including a Lake View Branch with limited hours (Tuesdays and Thursdays, 11am-3pm), and a strong emphasis on member relationships. MCECU operates under the standard NCUA insurance framework and maintains an active online presence with mobile banking capabilities.

MCECU offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including multiple savings account types (regular savings, money market, Christmas club, HSA, CDs, funeral trusts, and tax accounts), checking accounts tailored to different demographics (regular, 55+, student, and small business), and various loan products. Their loan offerings include auto loans (new and used), recreational vehicle financing, mortgages, home equity loans, debt consolidation loans, lines of credit, and signature loans, with advertised rates as low as 3.74% APR. The credit union also provides credit cards, IRAs (Roth, SEP, and standard), and retirement planning services.

What distinguishes MCECU is their emphasis on member-centric services and financial counseling. They offer free notary services, remote deposit capture, 24-hour telephone teller service, automatic payments, direct deposit, online bill pay, and a "MARS" member audio response system. The credit union maintains a surcharge-free ATM network through shared branching and has invested in mobile banking through their mcecu.mobi platform and downloadable smartphone apps. Their financial counselors are positioned as on-site resources offering tools and skills for financial improvement, differentiating them from purely transactional lenders.

MCECU appears well-suited for employees within their membership field and their families seeking competitive rates and personalized service. However, the limited branch hours (Lake View Branch operates only Tuesday-Thursday afternoons) may present accessibility challenges for some members. The credit union's membership base appears employer-specific, which may restrict accessibility for general consumers outside their membership criteria. Overall, MCECU represents a traditional, service-oriented credit union with solid product depth but geographic and membership limitations.
services: Regular savings accounts, money market accounts, and certificates of deposit
Christmas club accounts, health savings accounts, and funeral trusts
Fee-free checking (regular, 55+, student, and small business variants)
Individual retirement accounts (Roth, conversion Roth, SEP, and standard)
Auto loans for new and used vehicles
Mortgage loans of all types and home equity loans
Debt consolidation loans and signature loans
Online bill pay and automatic payments
Remote deposit capture via mobile app
pros: Competitive loan rates starting at 3.74% APR for qualified borrowers
Free notary services and remote deposit capture available to members
24-hour telephone teller service for account access and transactions
On-site financial counselors offering personalized financial planning tools
Surcharge-free ATM access through shared branching network nationwide
Mobile banking app available (mcecu.mobi) with same-day check deposit processing
Multiple account types tailored to specific demographics (students, seniors, small business)
cons: Limited physical branch hours (Lake View Branch only open Tuesdays-Thursdays, 11am-3pm)
Membership appears restricted to specific employee groups, limiting accessibility for general consumers
No information provided about membership eligibility criteria or how to join
Limited online transparency regarding current dividend rates and specific loan terms
Geographic limitation to Wisconsin service area may restrict accessibility for non-local members
best_for: Marathon County employees and their families seeking personalized member service
Borrowers prioritizing competitive loan rates and financial counseling support
Members desiring comprehensive financial products (mortgages, auto loans, savings) from a single institution
Individuals valuing free services like notary, bill pay, and remote deposit capture
diagnosis: MCECU is best for existing employees within their membership field and their families who value competitive rates, comprehensive financial products, and personalized service in a traditional credit union environment. The main caveat is that membership appears restricted to specific employee groups, and limited branch hours (Tuesday-Thursday afternoons only at the Lake View location) may create accessibility challenges for working members and those seeking weekday or weekend services.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Memphis City Employees — NCUA-insured credit union in MEMPHIS, TN. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
